creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:

  FreeBSD doc repository

  Modified files:
    share/sgml           mirrors.xml 
  Log:
  PR:     www/145219
  
  First? step in cleaning up our Polish mirror entries:
  
  - www.pl.FreeBSD.org    - HTTP has not seen an update since 2007        - remove it from the list
  - www2.pl.FreeBSD.org   - dead                                          - remove it from the list
  - ftp3.pl.FreeBSD.org   - broken sind 2010-02-16                        - comment out this entry
  - ftp5.pl.FreeBSD.org   - dead                                          - remove it from the list
  
  Pointed out by: wosch@
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.108     +2 -22     doc/share/sgml/mirrors.xml
